# awesome-ai-api (full dump for LLMs)

> Full, machine-readable leaderboard of AI API gateways, formatted for LLM ingestion.
> Snapshot: 2026-05-29 14:13 SGT. Total: 202. API-confirmed: 99.
> Canonical site: https://mackding.github.io/awesome-ai-api/
> Source repo: https://github.com/MackDing/awesome-ai-api
> License: MIT (code) + CC0 (data)

## Top 50 Gateways (sorted by score)

1. PackyAPI (PackyCode) — https://www.packyapi.com — score 9.9, API verified, region cn, engine unknown, latency 147ms, uptime 96.7% over 29 samples, models: claude, gpt, gemini, openai
2. AIHubMix — https://aihubmix.com — score 9.9, API verified, region global, engine openrouter, latency 366ms, uptime 96.7% over 29 samples, models: claude, gpt, gemini, chatgpt, openai, deepseek
